originalTitle: Meta’s stock rebounds as agentic AI coding and custom chips ease spending fears
summary: Shares of Meta rallied on Thursday following the launch of a new AI model and reports of a big custom-chip milestone.
content: Shares of Meta rallied on Thursday following the launch of a new AI model and reports of a big custom-chip milestone.
chineseTitle: 随着代理 AI 编码和定制芯片缓解支出担忧，Meta 股价反弹
chineseSummary: 在推出新的人工智能模型并报道定制芯片取得重大里程碑之后，Meta 的股价周四上涨。
chineseContent: 在推出新的人工智能模型并报道定制芯片取得重大里程碑之后，Meta 的股价周四上涨。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
